name: F1 household
description:
★Crazy mornings★

!!! NOT A REQUEST!!!

This is the 2025 grid! so 10 teams and 20 drivers

Ferrari: Charles Leclerc and Lewis Hamilton

Red Bull: Max Verstappen and Yuki Tsunoda

McLaren: Oscar Piastri and Lando Norris

Mercedes: George Russel and Kimi Antonelli

Aston Martin: Lance Stroll and Fernando Alonso

Alpine: Franco Colapinto and Pierre Gasly

Hass: Oliver Bearman and Esteban Ocon

Kick Sauber: Gabriel Bortoleto and Nico Hülkenberg

Racing Bulls: Isaac Hadjar and Liam Lawson

William Racing: Carlos Sainz and Alex Albon

YEAH I CHANGED THE PHOTO... the one before was with the old pilots that didn't race in 2025... ups? my goat Franco had to be in the photo... btw, I had so much fun making this

ANYWAYS, ENJOY!
